a.label: sign group H_sign = (C_2)^k

b.label: V_4 wr S_5 (headline-theorem closure-group notation)
b.standard_term: Klein four-group wreath product, i.e. C_2^2 wr S_5 (V_4 is isomorphic to C_2 x C_2)
